# ATS Resume Ready

> An honest AI career workspace for finding relevant jobs and tailoring ATS-ready resumes without inventing experience.

ATS Resume Ready helps candidates connect a target job with their real work history, assess fit, create a focused resume, and share a reviewable preview for trusted feedback.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of honest AI resume tailoring and the connected application workflow.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): The process from source profile to a tailored, feedback-ready application.
- [About](/about): ATS Resume Ready's principles for truthful, candidate-controlled career AI.
- [AI Career Workspace](/workspace): The resume tailoring and job-matching application.

## Guides

- [Can AI Tailor My Resume to a Job Posting?](/blog/can-ai-tailor-my-resume): A practical guide to using AI without misrepresenting skills or experience.
